About Shee Bakezz

Welcome to Shee Bakezz — a home bakery born from a passion for baking and a love for creating sweet memories. Every treat is handcrafted with premium ingredients and zero preservatives.

From rich chocolate drip cakes to our signature brownie slabs, bento cakes to festive Easter eggs — we bake everything fresh to order.

🏠100% Homemade
🎨Custom Designs
📦Pickup / Rapido
💳GPay Accepted

How to Order

1

Browse & Pick

Choose your favourite cake, brownie or treat. Customise flavour, weight & design.

2

WhatsApp Us

Send order details — flavour, weight, date & design. We'll confirm availability & total.

3

Pay & Pickup

Pay 50% advance via GPay (8220931895). Pickup from George Road or get Rapido delivery.
